case_title: LEWIS, STEVEN ALEXANDER vs. MONETTA, DR. BERNARD, OPTOMETRIST, A PROF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, STEVEN ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONETTA, DR. BERNARD, OPTOMETRIST, A PROF. CORP. $1,878.82 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,958.82

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, STEVEN ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT MONETTA, DR. BERNARD, OPTOMETRIST, A PROF. CORP.

parties.name: MONETTA, DR. BERNARD, OPTOMETRIST, A PROF. CORP.

attorneys.name: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA
